summary: See clues file for full details. 1 tossups, 6 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 1 tossups and 6 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This artist circulated a series of political drawings in which an old man watches the word "anarchy" rise with the sun.
examples: This artist circulated a series of political drawings in which an old man watches the word "anarchy" rise with the sun.

clues.clue: This artist's infected eye droops in a self-portrait painted while hiding in a hotel room from anti-Dreyfusard rioters.
examples: This artist's infected eye droops in a self-portrait painted while hiding in a hotel room from anti-Dreyfusard rioters.

clues.clue: A younger painter referred to this artist as "le bon dieu" after they lived together in the countryside; during that period, this artist of Social Turpitudes painted two women walking up around a bend on Jalais ["zhah-lay"] Hill.
examples: A younger painter referred to this artist as "le bon dieu" after they lived together in the countryside; during that period, this artist of Social Turpitudes painted two women walking up around a bend on Jalais ["zhah-lay"] Hill.

clues.clue: This artist of many (+) Pontoise landscapes painted two peasants and a hay cart directly onto a wooden palette.
examples: This artist of many (+) Pontoise landscapes painted two peasants and a hay cart directly onto a wooden palette.

clues.clue: Apple Harvest at Eragny ["ay-rah-nyee"] is one of four pointillist paintings that this artist displayed separately from the rest of his work at the Eighth Impressionist Exhibition.
examples: Apple Harvest at Eragny ["ay-rah-nyee"] is one of four pointillist paintings that this artist displayed separately from the rest of his work at the Eighth Impressionist Exhibition.

clues.clue: A 14 painting series by this artist shows the Boulevard Montmartre from above at different times and seasons.
examples: A 14 painting series by this artist shows the Boulevard Montmartre from above at different times and seasons.

clues.clue: The only member to exhibit at all eight Impressionist Exhibitions was, for 10 points, what teacher of (*) Cezanne and oldest impressionist?
examples: The only member to exhibit at all eight Impressionist Exhibitions was, for 10 points, what teacher of (*) Cezanne and oldest impressionist?
